refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on monitoring energy use, controlling equipment operation, and optimizing energy efficiency provides clearer design targets and verification paths.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data accuracy, control responsiveness, and achievement of energy_per_ton ≤ E_target over the evaluation period.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time energy consumption and tonnage moved.
FR2: Control vehicle operation to optimize energy usage.
FR3: Provide feedback and alerts to operators and managers on energy efficiency status.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy energy and tonnage sensors with data aggregation logic.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms to optimize energy use.
DP3: Develop user interface and alerting system for energy efficiency feedback.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to address monitoring, control, and feedback respectively.

potential_sources: Data dependency between monitoring and control modules.
Feedback loop coupling between control and alerting.
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data and reliable network communication.
Risk of control algorithm complexity impacting real-time performance.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing control and feedback to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including sensors and control systems embedded in the vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends energy consumption and tonnage data to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives operational commands from Teleoperation module.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends safety-related alerts to Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of energy monitoring and control functions; low diffusion outside vehicle.
Receives aggregated telemetry but does not contain direct control.
Interfaces with vehicle control but does not contain energy management.
Limited role in energy efficiency; mainly safety alerts.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy efficiency monitoring and control are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize interface complexity and latency.
containment_risks: Potential difficulty in updating control algorithms embedded in vehicle hardware/software.
Limited visibility of detailed energy data outside Vehicle may impact system-level optimization.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate feasibility of partial energy data processing in NGHE Solution to enhance system-level optimization.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion of telemetry data to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.
Control logic tightly coupled within Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment within Vehicle is strong, minimizing diffusion risks.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data analysis and operational testing of vehicle control.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of monitoring and control to Vehicle; feedback interfaces well defined.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing control algorithms for easier updates.
Assess potential for enhanced data processing in NGHE Solution.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time energy consumption and tonnage moved.
FR2: Control vehicle operation to optimize energy usage.
FR3: Provide feedback and alerts to operators and managers on energy efficiency status.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Reliable sensor data and network communication.
Vehicle module can support embedded control algorithms.
evidence_needed: Performance data of vehicle control algorithms.
Telemetry data accuracy and latency measurements.
